pi_items.source: Task description and verifier both confirm year 2030 is the target
iDempiere wiki (Calendar Year and Period Window ID-117) documents that Create Periods button generates '12 standard calendar month long standard periods'

Task description explicitly mentions finding 'Standard' Calendar; verifier checks for calendar_name == 'Standard'; but could not locate independent documentation confirming this calendar exists in GardenWorld seed data

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a financial year 2030 with 12 accounting periods in iDempiere's GardenWorld demo database. The Create Periods process in iDempiere generates exactly 12 standard monthly periods starting from January 1st by default. The verifier checks that the year exists, is linked to a calendar named 'Standard', and has 12 periods created. While the 12-period count and 2030 year target are verified against iDempiere documentation, the existence of a calendar specifically named 'Standard' in the default GardenWorld seed data could not be independently verified through available documentation.
